description: FLUX ISA v3 conformance test vectors — escape prefix, compressed shorts, security, async, temporal primitives

vectors.name: escape_nop
vectors.description: EXT_NOP (escape 0x00 sub-opcode 0x00) does nothing and continues

vectors.name: escape_fuel_check_default
vectors.description: EXT_FUEL_CHECK with default unlimited fuel (0xFFFFFFFF) pushes fuel remaining

vectors.name: escape_fuel_set_then_check
vectors.description: EXT_FUEL_SET 100 then EXT_FUEL_CHECK returns fuel <= 100

vectors.name: escape_fuel_exhausted_halt
vectors.description: FUEL_SET 2 then FUEL_CHECK exhausts remaining fuel, runtime halts

vectors.name: escape_fuel_decrement_per_check
vectors.description: FUEL_SET 10, two FUEL_CHECKs consume 2 fuel total, remaining=8

vectors.name: escape_time_now_monotonic
vectors.description: Two TIME_NOW calls return monotonically increasing timestamps (t, t+1)

vectors.name: escape_yield_no_contention
vectors.description: YIELD on resource 0x2A with no contention passes through immediately

vectors.name: escape_yield_with_contention
vectors.description: YIELD on resource 0x2A with contention should back off (implementation-defined delay)

vectors.name: escape_deadline_not_reached
vectors.description: DEADLINE far in future, program completes normally with MOVI R1 42 on stack

vectors.name: escape_deadline_exceeded
vectors.description: DEADLINE 1ms from now, then 10 TIME_NOW calls advance past deadline

vectors.name: escape_persist_state
vectors.description: PERSIST_CRITICAL_STATE addr=0x0064 size=0x0032 returns persist handle (1=success)

vectors.name: escape_cap_invoke_denied_no_capability
vectors.description: CAP_INVOKE cap_id=1 with no capabilities installed raises CAP_DENIED

vectors.name: escape_cap_invoke_granted
vectors.description: CAP_INVOKE cap_id=1 with pre-installed capability succeeds, returns 0

vectors.name: escape_identity_get_consistent
vectors.description: Two IDENTITY_GET calls return the same agent identity handle

vectors.name: escape_sandbox_enter_exit_normal
vectors.description: SANDBOX_ENTER (read+write) then SANDBOX_EXIT completes without error

vectors.name: escape_sandbox_readonly_write_blocked
vectors.description: SANDBOX_ENTER read-only then STORE to sandboxed address raises SANDBOX_VIOLATION

vectors.name: escape_mem_tag_set
vectors.description: MEM_TAG addr=0x0064 tag=0x32 sets tag without error

vectors.name: escape_suspend_saves_state
vectors.description: PUSH 42 then SUSPEND channel=1 — stack is captured in continuation, runtime halts cleanly

vectors.name: escape_resume_restores_state
vectors.description: Resume from previously suspended continuation restores stack with [42]

vectors.name: escape_fork_returns_context_id
vectors.description: FORK to address 20 returns a non-zero context ID (first context = 1)

vectors.name: escape_cancel_valid_context
vectors.description: FORK then CANCEL pops context_id from stack and returns 1 (success)

vectors.name: escape_cancel_invalid_context
vectors.description: CANCEL with invalid context_id (255) returns 0 (failure)

vectors.name: escape_await_nonblocking
vectors.description: AWAIT_CHANNEL timeout=0 is non-blocking, returns 0 (no message)

vectors.name: escape_join_nonexistent
vectors.description: JOIN with nonexistent context_id (999) raises JOIN_FAILED

vectors.name: escape_probe_known_extension
vectors.description: EXT_PROBE for extension 0x01 (temporal) returns 1 (supported)

vectors.name: escape_probe_unknown_extension
vectors.description: EXT_PROBE for extension 0xFE (not registered) returns 0 (unsupported)

vectors.name: escape_unsupported_traps
vectors.description: Executing unregistered extension 0xFD raises EXT_UNKNOWN error

vectors.name: v3_backward_compat_halt
vectors.description: v2 HALT (0x00) works identically on v3 runtime

vectors.name: v3_backward_compat_add
vectors.description: v2 ADD (MOVI R1,7 + MOVI R2,11 + ADD R0,R1,R2) works on v3 runtime

vectors.name: v3_backward_compat_mul
vectors.description: v2 MUL (6*7=42) works on v3 runtime

vectors.name: v3_backward_compat_jz_jnz
vectors.description: v2 JZ (skip MOVI when R1=0) then MOVI R1,42 works on v3

vectors.name: v3_backward_compat_loop
vectors.description: v2 LOOP (R1=5, R2 accumulates) gives R2=5 on v3 runtime

vectors.name: v3_backward_compat_fibonacci
vectors.description: v2 Fibonacci(7) = 13 — wait, let me recalculate. F(7)=13 actually. R3 should be 13. But actually the program puts F(7) into R0 via MOV R0, R3. F(7) with our starting values: F(0)=0, F(1)=1, loop 7 times. F(7)=13

vectors.name: compressed_movr_imm4
vectors.description: COMP_MOVI R1, 0x2 — packed rd=1 imm4=2 into byte 0x12

vectors.name: compressed_add_double
vectors.description: MOVI R1,5 then COMP_DOUBLE R2, R1 (R2 = R1+R1 = 10)

vectors.name: compressed_mov_register
vectors.description: MOVI R1,42 then COMP_MOV R2, R1 (R2 = R1 = 42)

vectors.name: compressed_cmp_eq_zero
vectors.description: MOVI R1,0 then COMP_CMP_EQ R2, R1 (R2 = (R1==0) = 1)

vectors.name: compressed_negate
vectors.description: MOVI R1,10 then COMP_NEG R2, R1 (R2 = -10)

vectors.name: compressed_push_pop
vectors.description: MOVI R1,42, COMP_PUSH R1, COMP_POP R2 (R2 = 42)

vectors.name: compressed_inc_dec
vectors.description: MOVI R1,5, COMP_INC R1 (R1=6), COMP_DEC R1 (R1=5)

vectors.name: security_fuel_denies_execution
vectors.description: FUEL_SET 1, FUEL_CHECK consumes it, MOVI should NOT execute

vectors.name: security_sandbox_nested_enter
vectors.description: Nested SANDBOX_ENTER (RW then RO) then double SANDBOX_EXIT completes

vectors.name: async_fork_multiple
vectors.description: Three FORK calls return context IDs 1, 2, 3

vectors.name: async_await_timeout_zero
vectors.description: Two AWAIT_CHANNEL calls with timeout=0, both return 0 (no message)

vectors.name: temporal_deadline_cancel_on_reach
vectors.description: DEADLINE 0 (already passed), but handler is at address 0 so it cancels immediately, program continues

vectors.name: temporal_persist_multiple_regions
vectors.description: Two PERSIST_CRITICAL_STATE calls for non-overlapping regions both return 1

vectors.name: escape_prefix_with_v2_mixed
vectors.description: v2 MOVI + v3 TIME_NOW + v2 MOVI + v2 ADD — mixed v2/v3 bytecode works

vectors.name: mixed_fuel_gated_computation
vectors.description: FUEL_SET 10, compute 3*4=12, FUEL_CHECK, then 5*6=30 — fuel gates computation

vectors.name: mixed_sandbox_protected_memory
vectors.description: SANDBOX_ENTER, STORE R1(42) to sandboxed addr, EXIT, LOAD from addr — value preserved

vectors.name: compressed_short_chain
vectors.description: Chain: COMP_MOVI R1,5 → COMP_DOUBLE R2,R1(=10) → COMP_MOV R3,R2(=10) → COMP_INC R3(=11)

vectors.name: backward_compat_mod
vectors.description: v2 MOD (17 % 4 = 1) works on v3 runtime

vectors.name: backward_compat_sub_negative
vectors.description: v2 SUB (3 - 10 = -7) works on v3 runtime

vectors.name: backward_compat_shift_ops
vectors.description: v2 SHL (8<<2=32) and SHR (8>>2=2) work on v3 runtime

vectors.name: backward_compat_logic_ops
vectors.description: v2 AND(0xF&0x3=3), OR(0xF|0x3=0xF), XOR(0xF^0x3=0xC) work on v3

vectors.name: backward_compat_min_max
vectors.description: v2 MIN(10,20)=10 and MAX(10,20)=20 work on v3 runtime

vectors.name: backward_compat_mov16
vectors.description: v2 MOVI16 R1, 0x0100 (=256) works on v3 runtime

vectors.name: backward_compat_storeoff_loadoff
vectors.description: v2 STOREOF R1(42) to addr 0x100 then LOADOFF R2 from 0x100 = 42

vectors.name: backward_compat_swap
vectors.description: v2 SWP R1, R2 — R1=42, R2=11, after swap R1=11, R2=42

vectors.name: escape_probe_all_extensions
vectors.description: EXT_PROBE for extensions 1(temporal), 2(security), 3(async), 4(negotiation) — first 3 supported

vectors.name: security_fuel_multiple_check
vectors.description: FUEL_SET 5, five FUEL_CHECKs — each consumes 1 fuel, last one triggers halt

vectors.name: async_suspend_preserves_registers
vectors.description: R1=42, R2=11, R3=7, R4=R1+R2=53 then SUSPEND — registers preserved in continuation
